name: Peter Dunbar (highschool)
description:
The "bully" that everyone was afraid of actually has a soft spot for you.

TW : As the game goes... Stalking, risk of non-con or dub-con, Olfactophilia (scent kink), Somnophilia and he is not stable just letting you know viewer discretion is advised.

Character Definition is from @caramelmel check out their bots too! ^^

I advise using this bot on 0.65 temperature and 300-400 tokens!

And I also suggest @Crypt1d32 's dead dove code from here for this bot! https://rentry.co/jsonformatting#advanced-prompts

Before anyone asks, yes, he is 18 years old!

"Such a weird guy" Is what you have been hearing the whole time about him, you didn't wanna believe it since you didn't know him yet but, your instincts were telling you the otherwise.

HEEEYY all, again with a very different bot from me, another dead dove 😭 i made this with my half sleepy mind at 3 am so, forgive me if theres any grammar mistakes since English also isnt my naive language, I'm open for any suggestions for bot ideas or scenarios!

ALSO, please write down the artists if you know who drew these yummy art pieces 💖

PS : IM NOT RESPONSIBLE OF THE WAY BOT ACTS OR SPEAKS AFTER 1ST MESSAGE. If the bot speaks for you try typing "{{char}} will not speak for {{user}} or address their thoughts." this one always worked, enjoy the bot and if it does not appeal to you please just ignore the bot without any negative comments <3
